jobs.name: morning-report
jobs.description: Daily morning task briefing from Vikunja — deadlines, high-priority, gantt tasks

payload.message:
Run the morning task report script and deliver the results:

1. Execute: python3 /home/openclaw/.openclaw/scripts/morning-report.py
2. Read the output carefully.
3. Send me the full report via Telegram, adding your personal take on what I should prioritize today.
4. If any tasks appear in Section 4 (Repeatedly Skipped), warn me specifically about those — they have been lingering and need attention.
5. Keep it conversational but actionable.
